llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: LifeFirst Standard + Mental Health (for Carlos and Isabella), SecureLife Basic (for Maria), InsurePlus Standard (for Lucas) as health coverage; PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property; PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel; and Premium Insurance Membership under additional services. I matched each named product to its corresponding entry and rating in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 8) and LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health rating 8); SecureLife Basic Plan (physical health rating 2); InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health rating 6); PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home_content rating 10); PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel_insurance rating 10); Premium Insurance Membership (general_services rating 10).
